parameters.body: ={{ "CREATE research_run SET run_id=" + JSON.stringify($json.run_id) + ", query=" + JSON.stringify($json.query) + ", language=" + JSON.stringify($json.language) + ", mode=" + JSON.stringify($json.mode) + ", domain='general', trigger_source=" + JSON.stringify($json.trigger_source) + ", status='pending', started_at=time::now()" + ($json.user_id ? ", user_id=" + JSON.stringify($json.user_id) : "") + ";" }}

={{ "UPDATE research_run SET search_plan=" + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify($json.search_plan)) + ", mode=" + JSON.stringify($json.mode) + ", domain='general', status='phase1' WHERE run_id=" + JSON.stringify($("Set Parameters").first().json.run_id) + ";" }}

={{ "UPDATE research_run SET status='phase4', source_count=" + ($json.sources || []).length + ", claim_count=" + ($json.claims || []).length + " WHERE run_id=" + JSON.stringify($("Set Parameters").first().json.run_id) + ";" }}

={{ "UPDATE research_run SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, failed_phase = 'phase3', gate3_passed = false, status = 'failed' WHERE run_id=" + JSON.stringify($("Set Parameters").first().json.run_id) + ";" }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: Number($("D: Prepare Telegram Message").first().json.telegram_chat_id), text: $("D: Prepare Telegram Message").first().json.telegram_message, parse_mode: "Markdown" }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: Number($("D: Prepare Telegram Message").first().json.telegram_chat_id), text: "War dieser Report hilfreich? (Run: " + $("Set Parameters").first().json.run_id + ")", reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: [[{ text: "\ud83d\udc4d Hilfreich", callback_data: "feedback_up_" + $("Set Parameters").first().json.run_id }, { text: "\ud83d\udc4e Nicht hilfreich", callback_data: "feedback_down_" + $("Set Parameters").first().json.run_id }]] } }) }}
